text.title: a11y-testing Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for a11y-testing as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating "0 violations" in axe as equivalent to WCAG conformance.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: axe covers ~30-40% of WCAG criteria. The "incomplete" and "inapplicable" arrays in axe JSON must be inspected; items in "incomplete" mean the tool gave up, not that the criterion passes.

failure-mode.description: Accepting "0 axe violations" as compliance without checking the "incomplete" array.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Items in the axe "incomplete" array are criteria the scanner could not evaluate (not "passed"). Treating incomplete as pass creates systematic blind spots.

failure-mode.description: Running agent "fix until axe passes" loops more than 3 iterations without an AT regression test.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Automated fix loops produce ARIA soup that passes axe but breaks real screen readers. Limit auto-fix iterations and require a human screen reader check after each batch of fixes.
